title: viburnum microphyllum
intro: Viburnum microphyllum, also known as the small-leaved arrowwood, is a species of flowering plant in the family Adoxaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Viburnum microphyllum include its ability to lower blood pressure, improve circulation, and possess antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal uses, with caution advised due to potential toxicity when ingested in large quantities.
